calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-25-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Thursday, August 25, 2016 in Department 525:
Assignee - Collectrix, Vadrick Banks, appears for Respondent/Plaintiff Lindsay Green who is not present.
Waseem Afzal, Appellant/Defendant appears as Propria Persona.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.
Mr. Banks, Collectrix, testifies on behalf of Lindsay Green and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced: Unmarked Evidence - plaintiff's response in opposition to defendant's motion to vacate judgment, 5 pages of text messages sent to Colectrix by plaintiff.

Appellant/Defendant, Waseem Afzal testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. No evidence is introduced by appellant.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Plaintiff/respondent's unmarked evidence is retained.

Judge Pro Tem Richard Grotch; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-21-2016 Denied

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-08-2013 Judgment Entered
